meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't debug code
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn to use a SaaS starter kit, Antigravity, and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients. Intermediate-level guide.
content.answer_block: Debugging is the silent killer of project profitability. You stop struggling with complex bugs by adopting a battle-tested SaaS starter kit that enforces strict architecture. By integrating Antigravity for automated refactoring and Claude Code for intelligent diagnostic loops, you transform your workflow from reactive fire-fighting into proactive, high-velocity feature delivery.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and you’re staring at a cryptic stack trace that makes no sense. We’ve all been there—trapped in a debugging loop that drains your billable hours and kills your creative momentum. When your codebase becomes a labyrinth of technical debt, you aren't just losing time; you're losing your reputation as a top-tier freelancer.

But what if you could stop debugging and start shipping? By leveraging a professional SaaS starter kit, you inherit a foundation where the infrastructure is already solved. When you pair this with AI-driven diagnostics, you don't just fix errors; you prevent them. This tutorial is your blueprint to reclaiming your schedule and delivering production-ready code with surgical precision.

steps.title: Bootstrap with a Production-Ready Starter Kit
steps.description: Initialize your project using a battle-tested SaaS starter kit to ensure consistent patterns and pre-configured error boundaries.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory and suggest a configuration that enforces modular architecture to minimize side-effect bugs.

steps.title: Configure Automated Diagnostic Hooks
steps.description: Set up automated watchers that trigger AI analysis the moment a build fails, preventing the 'black box' debugging experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a custom watcher script that pipes compiler errors directly into the Claude Code diagnostic context.

steps.title: Isolate Logic with Domain-Driven Design
steps.description: Refactor your core logic into isolated modules to make debugging predictable and unit-testable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the existing monolithic route handlers into isolated service classes following clean architecture patterns.

steps.title: Execute AI-Powered Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a deep dive into logs when a runtime error occurs, bypassing manual stack trace hunting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Explain the root cause of the current runtime error and propose a fix that maintains type safety and system performance.

steps.title: Validate with Automated Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure your fixes don't break existing features by generating snapshot tests for every patched module.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of integration tests for the recently refactored modules to ensure no regression in business logic.

pro_tips: Always use a 'debug-only' environment variable to toggle granular logging without polluting production performance.
Treat your error logs as data; use Claude Code to summarize log clusters into 'top 3 issues' to find patterns.
Implement 'Error Boundaries' in your UI components to prevent a single component crash from taking down the entire app.
Use Antigravity to periodically audit your dependencies for known vulnerabilities, a common source of 'ghost' bugs.
Never fix a bug without writing a test case for it; this turns every bug into a permanent feature guardrail.
content.next_steps: Now that your environment is debug-proof, focus on building your first feature module and running it through the new automated test suite.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your development pace and start shipping like a senior architect. With the right tooling, you can cut your debugging time by 70% and double your project output. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
